ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the state */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the state was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the state */,
  "is_initial" INTEGER /* Indicates if the state is the initial state */,
  "is_final" INTEGER /* Indicates if the state is a final/accepting state */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Links to the version of the FSM configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_states_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transitions" (
  "transition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transition */,
  "from_state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state from which the transition occurs */,
  "input_symbol" TEXT /* Input symbol that triggers the transition */,
  "to_state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state to which the transition leads */,
  "consume_input" INTEGER /* Indicates if the input symbol is consumed during transition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the transition was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the transition */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level for resolving conflicts in transitions */,
  "description" TEXT /* Additional details about the transition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transitions_from_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transitions_to_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stacks" (
  "stack_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stack operation */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state related to the stack operation */,
  "stack_operation" TEXT /* Description of the stack operation performed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the stack operation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the stack operation */,
  "operation_type" TEXT /* Type of operation (e.g., push, pop) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stack_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stacks_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "input_sets" (
  "input_set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each input set */,
  "input_string" TEXT /* The string input to be processed by the FSM */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the input set was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the input set */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the input set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("input_set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation run */,
  "input_set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the input set being processed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the simulation (e.g., accepted, rejected) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the simulation was run */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the simulation in milliseconds */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who ran the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_input_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("input_set_id") REFERENCES input_sets ("input_set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the tool */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., run simulation, modify FSM) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the tool */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "fsm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the FSM to which this version belongs */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Human-readable version number (e.g., 1.0, 1.1) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_fsm_id FOREIGN KEY ("fsm_id") REFERENCES fsm ("fsm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fsm" (
  "fsm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each FSM */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the FSM */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the FSM */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the FSM was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the FSM */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fsm_id")
)
